project.name: MP2027 Manager
project.type: Windows desktop app for MP2027 cost allocation and FORM export
project.status: Documentation consolidated into QUY_TRINH_NGHIEP_VU_MP2027.md as the single Markdown handover/business-process source. Runtime defaults to docs/MP2027/FORM.xlsx; OneFile should ship editable docs/MP2027 next to the exe; source order is configurable via docs/MP2027/source_file_order.csv.

tech_stack.environment: Windows; prefer stable ASCII logs when possible

database_schema.summary: Hub-centered data model for Cost Center, Account, Allocation Rules, direct-cost staging, manual headcount, and explicit FORM-row inputs.

tables.name: map_allocation_rules
tables.description: Allocation rules loaded from the FY2027 rules workbook.

tables.name: fact_input_data
tables.description: Staging hub for facility, fixed assets, IT simulation, GA, and manual special costs; includes nullable form_row.

tables.name: sys_params
tables.description: System parameters such as exchange rate and working days.

tables.name: fact_monthly_headcount
tables.description: Monthly headcount by CC with all/staff/worker plus male/female drivers.

features: docs/MP2027 is now the authoritative runtime source folder.
FORM.xlsx!B2 remains the single source of truth for exchange rate.
Loader parses numeric, comma-separated, and currency-suffixed unit prices such as 145$.
Allocation engine supports event posting-month tokens including 入社月, 配布月, 申請月, 取得月, and 翌月.
Allocation engine explicitly skips NNN/VISA/GPLD/Passport items until manual event data is provided.
Exporter clears stale sample cells in managed fixed-row ranges before writing real data.
Exporter supports explicit form_row writes so manual special costs can land on exact FORM rows.
Exporter reconstructs most alloc_* rows as Excel formulas instead of flat numeric output.
GUI and E2E defaults point to docs/MP2027 in both dev and packaged mode.
The current authoritative FORM is docs/MP2027/FORM.xlsx with detail rows extended to 1015.

patterns: docs/MP2027 is the authoritative runtime source; docs/MP2027/FORM_old.xlsx is comparison-only.
If a cost cannot be inferred from source workbooks, route it through event_drivers_manual.csv or special_costs_manual.csv; never fabricate budget values.
Exporter should keep Excel formulas where possible: constants as =amount, birthday as =count*152000, and IT as ROUND(component sum * $B$2).
Dashboard kiểm toán is the user-facing trust layer: XANH/VÀNG/ĐỎ per CC, missing-input actions, and formula preview before export trust.
gotchas: Do not use old root FORM.xlsx or docs/MP2027/FORM_old.xlsx for runtime export.
event_drivers_manual.csv is still empty/header-only until the user supplies real event counts or amounts.
headcount_manual.csv only has a small subset of CCs; missing CC/month/gender split should remain YELLOW, not guessed.
Health-check rows 57/58 require male/female December headcount when business needs gender-based calculation.
Internal matcher tokens such as nhap canh are intentionally not Vietnamese-display strings and should not be blindly converted.
PowerShell/CP932 can display Vietnamese file names as ?, while UTF-8 file contents may still be correct.
conventions: Fiscal period format is YYYYMM, covering April to March.
Primary business references are QUY_TRINH_NGHIEP_VU_MP2027.md and TODO_MP2027_OPEN_ITEMS.md.
Use docs/MP2026 only as a trusted comparison set, not as runtime input.
GUI visible text should be Vietnamese-first; the word Dashboard is allowed by user exception.
Keep FORM/account/source schema keys such as cc_code, account_code, form_row, staff, worker unchanged in code/data.

decisions.decision: Keep Dashboard as the only English UI exception and Vietnamese-localize other visible labels.
decisions.reason: User explicitly requested no English in UI except Dashboard, and finance users need low-anxiety clarity.

decisions.decision: Manual event entry must teach the user why and how to input missing data step-by-step.
decisions.reason: Unknown event counts/amounts cannot be inferred safely for company budgeting.

decisions.decision: Treat YELLOW/RED Dashboard states as audit prompts, not code failures.
decisions.reason: Many remaining gaps are missing real business inputs rather than implementation defects.

gotchas: Do not use old root FORM.xlsx or docs/MP2027/FORM_old.xlsx for runtime export.
event_drivers_manual.csv is still empty/header-only until the user supplies real event counts or amounts.
headcount_manual.csv only has a small subset of CCs; missing CC/month/gender split should remain YELLOW, not guessed.
Health-check rows 57/58 require male/female December headcount when business needs gender-based calculation.
Internal matcher tokens such as nhap canh are intentionally not Vietnamese-display strings and should not be blindly converted.
PowerShell/CP932 can display Vietnamese file names as ?, while UTF-8 file contents may still be correct.

pending_tasks.task: Collect real event driver data for JP/VN bus, no-trip gift, My Episode, 10-year events, company anniversary, and VISA/Passport rows if not row 137.
Collect/confirm manual headcount by CC/month, especially December male/female split for health-check rows 57/58.
Manually validate GUI layout in a real Windows Tkinter session after the Vietnamese UX changes.
If finance requires output for CCs with zero fact data, revisit batch-export selection that currently exports only CCs with account_code > 0 data.

recent_changes.description: Vietnamese-localized visible GUI labels except Dashboard; improved Dashboard kiểm toán with XANH/VÀNG/ĐỎ legend, row coloring, missing-input table, and formula preview.
Expanded Nhập sự kiện thiếu dữ liệu with why-this-is-needed text, 7-step instructions, event-specific hints, and Vietnamese labels.
Updated user-facing usage docs to match current workflow: FORM MP2027, manual data entry, Dashboard audit, and no fabricated numbers.
Ran py_compile for src/universal_app.py and unit tests: tests.test_src_v2_logic, tests.test_posting_month_logic, tests.test_headcount_and_export; 23 tests OK.
